lines.text: Pools at Disney's Pop Century Resort | Walt Disney World Resort
Pools at Disney's Pop Century Resort
Enjoy a splash from the past with this trio of themed swimming pools celebrating 3 unforgettable decades.
Go with the flow at the Hippy Dippy Pool, home to far-out flower-shaped water jets and a lazy 1960’s attitude. Featuring over 235,613 gallons, this pool is big on fun.
For the little ones, a kiddie pool is located behind Classic Hall, just behind the Hippy Dippy Pool.
For even more enjoyment, Disney movies are screened on select nights at the Hippy Dippy Pool.
Celebrate the 1950s at this 144,352-gallon pool shaped like a bowling pin.
Go for a dip at this 1990s-themed, computer-shaped pool that includes a giant floppy disc and keypad.

Let’s make a splash at Hippy Dippy Pool! Join us for family-friendly activities each day, like themed pool parties and other cool activities. Fun offerings include themed pool games, relays, trivia and more! See a Recreation Host for additional details.
Hours and lifeguard availability vary by pool and are subject to change.
Complimentary towels are provided at all pools.
